feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Event Mesh
feed.subtitle: SAP Event Mesh Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: BUS1029 Chart of Account (Event Missing)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

why has Object BUS1029 Chart of Account no events? 
If I try to generate a new object from that. It is not possible to generate that new object.

kind regards
Gunter

entry.title: Messages struck in event mesh
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

I'm not able to understand the reason for messages getting struck in the event mesh and why is CPI not able to poll the messages successfully. This happens every now and then. below is the configuration of AMQP adapter.

How to fix this?

entry.title: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Looking for a way to consume custom RAP events created on S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-Premise in BTP ABAP Environment using Event Consumption Model.

1. Creating custom RAP events

2. Event consumption model for standard S/4HANA events using AsyncAPI on BTP ABAP environment - Step 4 onwards. AsyncAPI/Event metadata for released events can be downloaded from api.sap.com

My question is how can I generate the event metadata/AsyncAPI file for custom RAP events in S/4HANA Private Cloud to be able to use the event consumption model in BTP ABAP environment. I know it is possible to generate the event metadata for RAP events in S/4HANA Public Cloud - Steps 1 to 3, but is this possible on Private cloud. If not how can we consume custom RAP events from private cloud in SAP BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Creating and triggering non-RAP custom events from S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create and trigger non-RAP custom enterprise events from S/4HANA Private Cloud preferably through ABAP? If so, how can it be achieved and can we generate an event metadata/AsyncAPI file for such custom events for use in Event Consumption Model on BTP ABAP environment?

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Consuming a released event of an unreleased RAP BO (how to achieve clean core)
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are confused. I was advised that the events in the accelerator hub can be consumed either via local or remote event consumption.

https://api.sap.com/event/OP_PRODUCTEVENTS/overview

Currently, local event consumption applies to RAP BO events. So I searched for the released RAP BO for products (https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_PRODUCTTP_2) and tried to create and implement and event handler class.

First thing that I noticed is that the events being raised are not there in the released RAP BO.

After further checking, I saw that the event is actually defined at the base BO level.

I did some further testing and found out that these events are being from the Manage Product Master fiori app by calling these static methods which in turn raises the RAP BO events.

Now, when I tried to consume these events using the released RAP BO, the system won't allow me because the events are defined at the base BO level. We are using S/4HANA 2023 private cloud edition (FPS00). We are not sure if the same behavior is there in the FPS version.

When I checked the SAP documentation(https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/business-event-consumption), it says that the event to be consumed needs to be exposed in a C1 released RAP BO interface.

However, the events are not exposed for most of the released RAP BOs interfaces (e.g., Product, Business Partner, Pricing). For these 3 RAP BOs, the events are only exposed in the base RAP BO.

The only way we can consume this is to create the event handler class under a 'Standard ABAP' package so that it will allows us to consume the event from the unreleased base RAP BO. We are trying to achieve clean core and we are limiting any Tier 3 developments. Is there a way to consume these events via Tier 1 approach without resorting to using SAP event mesh? SAP event mesh is usually only recommended if the event producer and consumer is different but in our case, the producer/consumer is the same S4H system.

Note: We are trying to use these events to replace the BTE functionality.

entry.title: Connecting Event Mesh from Cloud Foundry subaccount to CPI(Cloud Integration) in Neo subaccount
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For our customer, we have SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) in Neo environment and SAP Event Mesh will be in Cloud Foundry Subaccount. Both are in different Global Account.

Could you please let us know whether we can be able to connect seamlessly between two environment (CF and Neo) to integrate SAP CPI and Event Mesh in customer landscape for  Event Driven Integration.

I would like to know the feasibility of this kind of setup and whether there will be any challenges or not?

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Configure SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise via Service Key
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to create channel to connect SAP EVENT MESH with S4/Hana On Premise via service key.

While creating channel from /iwxbe/config via service key i am getting below error.

 

Could you please help.

SAP BTP cockpit SAP Integration Suite , SAP Event Mesh 

Thanks & Regards

Deepak

entry.title: How to set up Manage Sales Order ( Live Process Project ) in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing the Manage Sales Order (Live Process Project) in SAP Build Process Automation, but we have a few queries regarding the configuration setup:

 


1. In the attached screenshot, we can see that the functionality is typically achieved using Workflow Management. However, the documentation mentions that this functionality can be achieved either by Workflow Management or Build Process Automation. Could you please provide the process flow steps for achieving this functionality using Build Process Automation?

 

2. In the Functionality Diagram, Event Mesh is part of Workflow. Since we are following Build Process Automation, do we need to set up Event Mesh, or is it already available within Build Process Automation? If it's available, where can we check this functionality? If it's not available, could you guide us on how and where to set it up?

 

3. For configuring Cloud Integration, please provide the Configuration Setup Guide and explain how it works in the context of SAP Build Process Automation.

 

4. Is it mandatory to configure an Email Destination in SAP BTP, or is it already preconfigured in the Build Process Automation project?

 

5. Is it mandatory to configure Workflow Destinations in SAP BTP for SAP Build Process Automation, or is this not required since we are only using Build Process Automation and not Workflow?

 

6. Is Process Visibility Service required in Build Process Automation? If so, how can we set it up, as the service is not available in BTP? 

 

7. Is configuring a Business Rules Destination required in Build Process Automation? If yes, could you please clarify the URL that needs to be provided? The Setup Guide mentions the URL part but doesn’t provide full details, so we would appreciate it if you could provide the complete URL format. 

 

could you please guide us on how to set up the necessary configurations .

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Event Mesh SAP Cloud for Customer integration with SAP S/4HANA  SAP Business Workflow SAP Workflow Management SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 

Thanks & Regards,
Vijay Kumar.

entry.title: Extend EVENT in ABAP S4 HANA on premise
entry.content:
Hi Expert

It is required to add the new fields for filtering event ( event mesh)  "businesspartner/v1/BusinessPartner/Changed/" in S4 Hana On  premise system.

followed the video - 

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

this explained the cloud .

 

How can I do it in on premise ( Product version S4HANA ON PREMISE -2023 )?

Can you please share tutorial/video with steps ?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: How to add 'Additional filter option s4 standard event'
entry.content:
Hi,

I could extend the payload of event mesh for business partner as described below video.

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

but It failed to add the filter option in S4 hana on-premise. 

Position is not available in S4 Hana -on premise .

Can you please help on this?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: Notification Error / Stop Automatic Event Mesh - S/4
entry.content: We currently have an issue with Event Mash. We are using the standard execution parameters, but at times it automatically turns off, interrupting the processes of sending integration to BTP/CPI and we do not receive any alert/notification of the problem, We need to understand the reason for the interruption and if there is a standard notification solution, in case this problem occurs

entry.title: Hello, May we know if the reported issue is fixed or still persists ?
entry.content: Hello, May we know if the reported issue is fixed or still persists ?

entry.title: Trigger event from SAP Document Management Service
entry.content: Is it possible to receive a notification / event / or call webhook when a file is uploaded / changed in SAP Document Management Service.

entry.title: Content-type when calling web hook from Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to call a an API on Service Now as a WebHook from SAP Event Mesh . The API only accepts the content-type application/json, but Event Mesh sets the content type to application/cloudevent+json, despite our settings.

We have configured the web hook to have a default content type of application/json, and I can see in the cloud event coming from S/4 that the content type is set as application/json

See attached screenshots of config and the relevant envelope.

What can we do make sure we always use application/json when calling this web hook?

Regards

Mattias

entry.title: Event Mesh activation in Integration Suite fails
entry.content:
Hi,

I added Manage Business Events (Event Mesh) from Manage Capabilities in Integration Suite and activated it in Configure -> Event Mesh and it shows Failed.

Even if I Deactivate the Event Mesh and reactivate it, it still shows Failed.
Please let me know if you know the cause or how to solve this problem.

Best Regards,
KuroKen.

entry.title: Processing messages from dead message queue of SAP event mesh
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the best approach to process the messages from a dead message queue in SAP Event Mesh?

Does it make sense to me to create another iFlow to periodically read from DMQ using REST and process/put the message back to the main queue? Is there any manual way to put the messages from DMQ to main queue?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Publish SAP Asset Performance Management Indicator Updates via Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hey, i am a little new to SAP - so please excuse inaccuracies. I have the following issue:

I want to connect my SAP Asset Performance Management Instance with my S4/Hana Instance
There is an Event Mesh and an APM instance in my SAP BTP cockpit already


Now as far as i understand it, the SAP Event Mesh only allows S4/Hana to publish information, but since my IoT Devices send their indicator information directly to APM,i am still looking for a way to transfer these IoT device Indicators from to my S4/Hana.
That is because S4 contains the rules that fire maintenance requests.

I know that there is a way to implement it manually, but if possible i want to stick to OOTB solutions.
To summarize: Is it possible to post SAP APM indicator updates to S4/Hana (e.g. via Event Mesh)?

entry.title: Cap application stops listen Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have a CAP App with multi tenancy arch. And I am using Event Mesh with these configuration but while in application use somewhere in application is stopping listening the queue. When I restart the app, app is woking fine again.

Why this stituaion might happen, any idea?

"messaging": {
        "kind": "enterprise-messaging-shared",
        "subscribePrefix": "$namespace/",
        "queue": {
          "name": "$namespace/etransport-queue",
          "accessType": "NON_EXCLUSIVE"
        }
      }

entry.title: Integration Suite Event Mesh Capability - Programmatically query queues
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to know if there is a programmatic way to query queues (names, Queue Size, number of Messages Queued, number of Unacknowledged Messages) like by using an ODATA service.

We need to create an alert if messages stored in the queues are not being consumed by the iFlows, but right now, we couldn't find a way to do it, only a manual way.

Thanks
